---
title: "Gapminder EDA 대시보드"
author: "정원영"
date: "2026-06-27"
lang: ko
format:
  dashboard:
    theme: cosmo
    nav-buttons: [github]
    scrolling: false
    embed-resources: true
execute:
  warning: false
  message: false
  echo: false
knitr:
  opts_chunk:
    dev: "png"
    dpi: 110
---

```{r setup}
library(readr); library(dplyr); library(ggplot2)
set.seed(42)

infile <- if (file.exists("data/gapminder.csv")) "data/gapminder.csv" else "../data/gapminder.csv"
gap <- read_csv(infile, show_col_types = FALSE)
gap$loggdp <- log(gap$gdpPercap)
FIRST <- min(gap$year); LAST <- max(gap$year)

theme_set(theme_minimal(base_size = 12))
cont_colors <- c(Africa="#E69F00", Americas="#56B4E9", Asia="#009E73",
                 Europe="#CC79A7", Oceania="#0072B2")

g07 <- filter(gap, year == LAST)
glob <- gap |> group_by(year) |>
  summarise(uw = mean(lifeExp), w = weighted.mean(lifeExp, pop),
            gdp = mean(gdpPercap), .groups = "drop")

# 핵심 KPI — 기대수명(생명) 중심
le_2007   <- round(glob$uw[glob$year==LAST], 1)                       # 2007 세계 평균 수명
le_gain   <- round(glob$uw[glob$year==LAST] - glob$uw[glob$year==FIRST], 1)  # 55년간 증가
top_le    <- g07[which.max(g07$lifeExp), ]                            # 2007 최장수국
le_max    <- round(top_le$lifeExp, 1); le_max_country <- top_le$country
fit       <- lm(lifeExp ~ loggdp, data = gap)
r2        <- round(summary(fit)$r.squared, 2)
```

# 개요

## Row {height="25%"}

```{r}
#| content: valuebox
#| title: "세계 평균 기대수명 (2007)"
list(icon = "heart-pulse-fill", color = "success",
     value = sprintf("%.1f세", le_2007))
```

```{r}
#| content: valuebox
#| title: "기대수명 증가 (1952→2007)"
list(icon = "graph-up-arrow", color = "primary",
     value = sprintf("+%.1f세", le_gain))
```

```{r}
#| content: valuebox
list(title = sprintf("최장수국 · %s (2007)", le_max_country),
     icon = "trophy-fill", color = "info",
     value = sprintf("%.1f세", le_max))
```

## Row {height="75%"}

### Column {width="60%"}

```{r}
#| title: "전지구 기대수명: 비가중 vs 인구가중"
glob_long <- bind_rows(
  transmute(glob, year, value = uw, 기준 = "비가중(국가 평균)"),
  transmute(glob, year, value = w,  기준 = "인구가중(사람 평균)"))
ggplot(glob_long, aes(year, value, color = 기준)) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1.2) + geom_point(size = 1.8) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("비가중(국가 평균)"="#999999",
                                "인구가중(사람 평균)"="#D55E00")) +
  labs(x = "연도", y = "기대수명(세)", color = NULL) +
  theme(legend.position = "bottom")
```

### Column {width="40%"}

```{r}
#| title: "대륙별 평균 1인당 GDP (로그)"
gap |> group_by(continent, year) |>
  summarise(gdpPercap = mean(gdpPercap), .groups = "drop") |>
  ggplot(aes(year, gdpPercap, color = continent)) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1) + geom_point(size = 1.3) +
  scale_y_log10(labels = scales::comma) +
  scale_color_manual(values = cont_colors) +
  labs(x = "연도", y = "1인당 GDP (log10)", color = NULL) +
  theme(legend.position = "bottom")
```

# 분포 · 대륙

## Row

### Column {.tabset}

```{r}
#| title: "분포의 시간 이동"
ggplot(filter(gap, year %in% c(1952, 1977, 2007)),
       aes(lifeExp, fill = factor(year), color = factor(year))) +
  geom_density(alpha = 0.35) +
  scale_fill_brewer(palette = "Set1") + scale_color_brewer(palette = "Set1") +
  labs(x = "기대수명(세)", y = "밀도", fill = "연도", color = "연도")
```

```{r}
#| title: "1인당 GDP 분포 (로그)"
ggplot(gap, aes(gdpPercap)) +
  geom_histogram(bins = 40, fill = "#009E73", color = "white") +
  scale_x_log10(labels = scales::comma) +
  labs(x = "1인당 GDP (log10)", y = "관측치")
```

### Column

```{r}
#| title: "대륙별 기대수명 분포 (2007)"
ggplot(g07, aes(reorder(continent, lifeExp, median), lifeExp, fill = continent)) +
  geom_boxplot(alpha = 0.8, outlier.alpha = 0.5) +
  geom_jitter(width = 0.15, alpha = 0.35, size = 1) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = cont_colors, guide = "none") +
  coord_flip() + labs(x = NULL, y = "기대수명(세)")
```

## Row {height="38%"}

```{r}
#| title: "대륙별 요약통계 (2007)"
g07 |> group_by(대륙 = continent) |>
  summarise(`국가 수` = n(),
            `평균 수명` = round(mean(lifeExp), 1),
            `중앙값` = round(median(lifeExp), 1),
            `표준편차` = round(sd(lifeExp), 2),
            `평균 GDP` = round(mean(gdpPercap)),
            .groups = "drop") |>
  knitr::kable()
```

# 수렴 · 모형

## Row

### Column

```{r}
#| title: "σ-수렴: 국가 간 변동계수 추이"
sigma <- gap |> group_by(year) |>
  summarise(`기대수명` = sd(lifeExp)/mean(lifeExp),
            `log(GDP)` = sd(loggdp)/mean(loggdp), .groups = "drop")
bind_rows(
  transmute(sigma, year, cv = `기대수명`, 지표 = "기대수명"),
  transmute(sigma, year, cv = `log(GDP)`, 지표 = "log(1인당 GDP)")) |>
  ggplot(aes(year, cv, color = 지표)) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1.2) + geom_point(size = 1.8) +
  labs(x = "연도", y = "변동계수 (sd/mean)", color = NULL) +
  theme(legend.position = "bottom")
```

```{r}
#| title: "β-수렴: 초기 수명 vs 이후 증가폭"
beta <- inner_join(
  filter(gap, year==FIRST) |> select(country, continent, le0 = lifeExp),
  filter(gap, year==LAST)  |> select(country, le1 = lifeExp), by = "country") |>
  mutate(growth = le1 - le0)
ggplot(beta, aes(le0, growth, color = continent)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.8, size = 2) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", formula = y~x, color = "black", se = TRUE) +
  scale_color_manual(values = cont_colors) +
  labs(x = "1952 기대수명(세)", y = "1952→2007 증가폭(세)", color = NULL) +
  theme(legend.position = "bottom")
```

### Column

```{r}
#| title: "기대수명 vs 1인당 GDP (2007, 버블=인구)"
ggplot(g07, aes(gdpPercap, lifeExp, color = continent, size = pop)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.7) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", formula = y~log(x), color = "black",
              se = FALSE, linewidth = 0.7, show.legend = FALSE) +
  scale_x_log10(labels = scales::comma) +
  scale_size(range = c(1.5, 16), guide = "none") +
  scale_color_manual(values = cont_colors) +
  labs(x = "1인당 GDP (log10)", y = "기대수명(세)", color = NULL,
       subtitle = sprintf("lifeExp ~ log(GDP):  R² = %.2f", r2)) +
  theme(legend.position = "bottom")
```

## Row {height="40%"}

### Column

```{r}
#| title: "소득 대비 장수 (양의 잔차 상위)"
g07r <- g07 |> mutate(resid = lifeExp - predict(fit, pick(everything())))
g07r |> slice_max(resid, n = 5) |>
  transmute(국가 = country, 대륙 = continent,
            GDP = round(gdpPercap), 수명 = round(lifeExp,1),
            잔차 = round(resid,1)) |>
  knitr::kable()
```

### Column

```{r}
#| title: "부유하지만 단명 (음의 잔차 — 에이즈·자원경제)"
g07r |> slice_min(resid, n = 5) |>
  transmute(국가 = country, 대륙 = continent,
            GDP = round(gdpPercap), 수명 = round(lifeExp,1),
            잔차 = round(resid,1)) |>
  knitr::kable()
```
